ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Top, Bottom, Dress) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of similar sizes (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Ireland/UK, EU, US) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "conversion_value" INTEGER /* The conversion value for the size in the specified region */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., Length, Weight, Chest Size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock, Backorder) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering products */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory level falls below the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "preferred_region" TEXT /* Preferred region for size conversion */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Customer email address */,
  "preferred_size_type" TEXT /* Preferred size type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_preferences ("customer_id")
)
